ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', ISCHANGED(Priority__c), $Profile.Name <> 'SW Read Only (View all GTM Data)', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Hey, only Management has permission to change the Priority of this request
